name: Fix writing class voice.md unreachable

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Fix writing class voice.md unreachable is complete and correct

scope: writing/voice.md is unreachable: ClassRepository.Resolve('writing') returns only writing.md, so agents loading the writing class never see writing/voice.md. Either writing.md should instruct the agent to read writing/voice.md from disk, or the reference should be removed. Investigate how ClassRepository.Resolve works for classes that have subdirectory assets, determine the correct fix, and implement it.
success_criteria: ClassRepository.Resolve('writing') returns content from both writing.md and writing/voice.md
writing.md contains no dangling references to unreachable prompts
All existing ClassRepository tests continue to pass (no regressions)
ClassRepository contract spec reflects the new assembly behavior

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: subdirectory-assembly (implements multi-file Resolve), prompt-and-spec-cleanup (updates writing.md and contract spec). Ordering: implementation first because the prompt cleanup depends on knowing the exact assembly behavior. Relevant specs found: classrepository-contract (2026-03-18T22-31Z), contextbuilder-contract (2026-03-18T23-11Z), tierfs-resolver-contract (2026-03-18T20-23Z). ADR for one-level fallback (2026-03-18T22-43Z) is compatible with this change since subdirectory assembly is orthogonal to fallback depth.
